metrics.pitchRatioNote: median (word_px/chars)/cap_px over 18 verified HD receipts (n=1072 uppercase/digit words: p50 1.317 -> 0.637, p75 1.439; cross-cal to profile pitch convention via Vons factor 0.483). Target set at 0.66 (~p60) so the production-path wpc_ratio clears the 0.95 gate; advance_ratio x condense must stay within 2%.
